---
title: "What Is Causal Inference?"
sort_date: "2026-06-23"

categories:
  - Causal Inference
  - Methods

description: >
  An introduction to causal inference and its role in epidemiologic research.


---

## Introduction

causal inference is xxx An introduction to causal inference and its role in epidemiologic research.An introduction to causal inference and its role in epidemiologic research.An introduction to causal inference and its role in epidemiologic research.
